metadata.description: Local marketplace for the agent-bridge Claude Code plugins — tools-only MCP server + session-scoped channel plugin for cross-machine agent-to-agent communication.

plugins.name: agent-bridge
plugins.description: Tools-only MCP server for agent-bridge. Exposes bridge_send_message / bridge_receive_messages / bridge_run_command / bridge_status / bridge_list_machines / bridge_clear_inbox / bridge_inbox_stats. Pair with the agent-bridge-channel plugin for inbound channel push.

plugins.name: agent-bridge-channel
plugins.description: Long-lived, session-scoped Claude Code channel plugin for agent-bridge. Watches the local inbox and pushes incoming messages from paired machines into the running session as <channel source="agent-bridge"> events. Pair with the agent-bridge plugin for outbound MCP tools.
